learner_model.intended_use: practice moving from an observation to a qualified explanation
mentor_style: ask for short public reasoning products
learner_model.success_condition: the learner can state an observation, compare explanations, and identify what evidence would change the conclusion

sequence.title: Observation
sequence.session_goal: State what was observed without smuggling a cause into the description.
sequence.mentor_opening: What can you report here before using the word because?
sequence.next_transition: Move from the observation to more than one possible explanation.

sequence.title: Alternative Explanations
sequence.session_goal: Compare plausible explanations without treating the first one as established.
sequence.mentor_opening: What else could produce the same observation?
sequence.next_transition: Move to a conclusion that states both support and limits.

sequence.title: Qualified Conclusion
sequence.session_goal: Write a conclusion proportional to the available evidence.
sequence.mentor_opening: Which claim is supported, and what remains uncertain?
sequence.evidence_focus: claim strength, limitations, and revision conditions
sequence.next_transition: Use the same reasoning pattern with a domain-specific source set.
